success.title: Payment Successful!
success.description: Thank you for your purchase. Your order has been confirmed and you now have access to premium features.

verifying.title: Verifying payment...
verifying.description: Please wait while we update your account.

error.title: Verification Error
error.message: We couldn't confirm your payment. Please contact support if funds were deducted.

cancel.title: Order Cancelled
cancel.description: Your payment was not completed. No charges have been made to your account.
cancel.tryAgain: Try again or choose a different plan.
